title: Remove Extra Spaces Tool
shortDescription: Remove repeated spaces from pasted text and turn messy lines into clean, readable text.
metaDescription: Strip repeated spaces from pasted text and keep line breaks intact for cleaner, easier-to-read text.
intro: Paste your text, remove repeated spaces, and get a cleaner version while keeping the original line breaks.
overview:
Use this tool to collapse repeated spaces inside text without changing the wording. It is useful when copied content includes uneven spacing from email, documents, chat logs, or code comments and you want the text to read normally again.

The tool keeps line breaks in place, so separate paragraphs and list items stay separated. It is designed for text cleanup tasks where you need a tidy result before sharing, comparing, formatting, or importing the content elsewhere.

If your text contains tabs, mixed spacing, or accidental gaps between words, the output gives you a consistent, readable version you can use right away.
howItWorks: Paste or type the text into the input field.
The tool removes repeated spaces while preserving line breaks.
Copy the cleaned text and use it in your document, message, or editor.

examples.title: Sentence with repeated spaces
examples.description: Collapses repeated spaces inside a single sentence.

examples.title: Text with paragraphs
examples.input:
First line with   extra spaces.

Second   line here.
examples.output:
First line with extra spaces.

Second line here.
examples.description: Removes repeated spaces while leaving paragraph breaks intact.

examples.title: Mixed tabs and spaces
examples.description: Converts mixed spacing into a readable single-space layout.

faq.question: Does this tool remove line breaks too?
faq.answer: No. It removes repeated spaces inside the text, but keeps line breaks so separate paragraphs remain separate.

faq.question: What happens with tabs or other whitespace?
faq.answer: Tabs are treated as spacing and are collapsed into normal spacing, which helps turn pasted text into a consistent format.

faq.question: Will it change punctuation or words?
faq.answer: No. The tool only adjusts spacing. It does not rewrite punctuation, spelling, or letter case.

faq.question: Why does my text still have one space between words?
faq.answer: That is expected. The goal is to reduce repeated gaps to a clean single-space format, not to remove all spaces.

faq.question: What mistake should I avoid when checking the result?
faq.answer: Do not compare only the first line. If your input has multiple paragraphs, review the whole output to confirm the spacing stays correct everywhere.

seo.title: Remove Extra Spaces Tool
